keys.backupCreated: Ubufunguzo bwo kubika bwaremwe kandi bwakurikiranywe ✓
keys.restored: Ubufunguzo bwo kubika bwagaruwe ✓ Ubufunguzo bwashyizwe ku kintu cy'ibanze
keys.noBackup: Nta bufunguzo bwo kubika bw'ibanga buriho ku konti iyi
keys.missingPublicKey: Ubufunguzo bwo kubika burimo ubufunguzo bwa public

keySetup.title: Shyira mu gikoresho ibifunguzo byawe
keySetup.description: Iki kintu cy'ibanze ntikigire ubufunguzo bwawe bwa private. Gukura ubufunguzo bwo kubika bufite ijambo ry'ibanga, cyangwa kurema ubufunguzo bushya (uzabasha gusoma ubutumwa bushya kuva ubu).
keySetup.chooseFile: Hitamo dosiye kandi winjize ijambo ry'ibanga.
keySetup.imported: Ubufunguzo bwa private bwakuwemo ku kintu cy'ibanze. Ubu ushobora gusoma ubutumwa bwa kera.
keySetup.enterPassword: Injiza ijambo ry'ibanga ry'akonti yawe kugira ngo dushobore kubika ibifunguzo byawe mu buryo bwa kibanga.

auth.headline: Ubutumwa bw'umutekano ku muntu wese, aho ari hose
auth.description: Iby'ibanga bya end-to-end, guhindura mu ndimi 100+, ubutumwa bw'igikurikira, n'itangira ry'amajwi/n'itangira ry'ivideyo.

feature.translation: Guhindura ubutumwa mu buryo bwa smart
feature.privacy: Ibanga ry'ibanze. Amakuru yawe, ubuyobozi bwawe.
feature.translate: Guhindura ubutumwa mu buryo bwa smart

hero.line1: Ubutumwa bw'umutekano ku muntu wese, aho ari hose — hamwe na
hero.sub: Gira inomero y'umutekano y'ibanze kugira ngo uhamagara kandi uandike ku isi yose ku Wi-Fi cyangwa data. Enjoy iby'ibanga bya end-to-end, ubutumwa bw'igikurikira, n'amajwi n'itangira ry'ivideyo ya HD — hamwe n'ibikoresho bya built-in bituma ukomeza kuba ufite umubano mu mpaka.
hero.freeNote: Uhamagara n'itandika ry'ibanze ni ubusa. Ibikoresho bya AI bya advanced n'ibindi bya premium bisaba upgrade.

feat.encryption: Iby'ibanga bya end-to-end, buri gihe biriho
feat.privacy: Ibanga ry'ibanze. Amakuru yawe, ubuyobozi bwawe.

auth.desktopTip: Ku desktop? Scan na telephone yawe kugira ngo ubone app.
auth.scanHelper: Ku desktop? Scan na telephone yawe kugira ngo ubone app.
auth.subhead: Ubutumwa bw'ibanga, bw'ibanga kandi bwahinduye — mu kanya.
auth.tip: Tip: Koresha konti imwe ku web na mobile. Ubutumwa bwawe burakomeza kuba synced.
auth.scanHint: Scan kugira ngo ukurikire app cyangwa ufungure mu browser yawe.

registration.passwordDescription: Min 6 inyuguti. Koresha ijambo ry'ibanga ry'ingenzi kandi ry'ibanze.
registration.smsConsent: Mu kurema konti, wemera kubona ubutumwa bwa SMS bwifitanye isano n'ibikorwa bya Chatforia (nk'ubutumwa bwa abandi mukoresha). Ubutumwa n'igiciro cya data bishobora kugira icyo bishyura. Ushobora gukora opt out igihe icyo ari cyo mu Settings.

auth.addRecipient: Ongera uwandikiye hejuru kugira ngo utangire…
auth.enterValidRecipient: Injiza izina ry'umukoresha wabikijwe cyangwa nomero ya telephone.
auth.sendFailed: Kohereza byanze. Reba console kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro.

home.title: Rugo
home.subheader: Kohereza ubutumwa kugira ngo utangire chat.

chat.selectPrompt: Hitamo umwandiko cyangwa icyumba cy'ikiganiro kugira ngo utangire kuganira
chat.emptySubtitle: Kohereza ubutumwa kugira ngo utangire chat.
chat.unlockToView: Fungura ubufunguzo bwawe kugira ngo ubone ubu butumwa

messageInput.freeLimit: Igice cy'ubusa: auto-delete kugeza ku munsi 1. Clamped kuri 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Max auto-delete kuri Premium ni iminsi 30. Clamped kuri 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Andika ubutumwa cyangwa ongere dosiye kugira ngo kohereze.
messageInput.caption: Ubutumwa (optional)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Umwambaro mwinshi cyane. Gerageza dosiye nto.
errors.rateLimit: Uri kohereza ubutumwa vuba cyane. Nyamuneka oroshya.
errors.validation: Ikosa ry'ikigeragezo. Nyamuneka reba ubutumwa bwawe kandi gerageza nanone.
errors.failedToSend: Kohereza byanze. Ushobora kugerageza bubble yanze.

contactList.couldNotStart: Ntiwashoboye gutangira chat. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
contactList.startFailed: Gutangira chat byanze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
contactList.deleteFailed: Gukuraho umukoresha byanze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Guhindura alias byanze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
contactList.loadFailed: Gukura abakoresha byanze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
contactList.callStarted: Hamagara iyi nomero ku nomero ya Chatforia yawe…
contactList.callFailed: Gutangira hamagara byanze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.

startChatModal.title: Tangira ikiganiro
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Shakisha izina, izina ry'umukoresha, cyangwa nomero ya telephone

addContactModal.title: Ongera umukoresha
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Injiza nomero ya telephone cyangwa izina ry'umukoresha.

sidebar.loginPrompt: Injira kugira ngo uhindure settings yawe.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Nta media yabikijwe ku kintu cy'ibanze.

profile.title: Profil y'umukoresha
profile.mustLogin: Ugomba kwinjira kugira ngo urebe settings.
profile.noPrivateKey: Nta bufunguzo bwa private buri ku kintu cy'ibanze kugira ngo ukore export.
profile.setBackupPassword: Shyira ijambo ry'ibanga kugira ngo ukore encrypt backup yawe:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Injiza ijambo ry'ibanga ry'ubu bufunguzo bwo kubika:
profile.importSuccess: Ubufunguzo bwa private bwakuwemo ku kintu cy'ibanze.
profile.importFailed: Gukura ubufunguzo byanze (ijambo ry'ibanga ritari ry'ukuri cyangwa dosiye yononekaye).
profile.keysRotated: Ubufunguzo bushya bwaremwe kandi public key yashyizwe.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ubufunguzo bwawe bwa private ntibuvamo iki kintu cy'ibanze. Export ubufunguzo bufite ijambo ry'ibanga kugira ngo ubugarure ku kintu cy'ibanze.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Uri ku Free—koresha Sun/Moon by'ibanze. Upgrade kugira ngo ubone themes byinshi.
profile.backupDesc: Kubika ubufunguzo bwawe bw'ibanga kugira ngo ubugarure ubutumwa bwawe ku kintu cy'ibanze.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Blur igihe app itari ku kintu
profile.freePlanCopy: Uri ku gahunda y'ubusa. Upgrade kugira ngo ubone ibikoresho byinshi nka backups, nomero z'inyongera, n'ibindi bya privacy bya advanced.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ntiwashoboye kufungura billing portal. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
profile.followHint: Inkuru zabo zizagaragara mu Following feed yawe niba bashyize audience Followers (cyangwa Public).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Ikintu cy'ikibazo cyabaye mu gice kiyi.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Kohereza hamagara n'ubutumwa by'imbere ku telephone cyangwa email yawe y'ibanze. Kohereza hamagara/ubutumwa bishobora kugaragara nomero ya Chatforia yawe.
profile.errSmsDest: Hitamo byibura aho kohereza kimwe (telephone cyangwa email).
profile.errQuietHours: Amasaha y'ibanga agomba kuba hagati ya 0 na 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Dukoresha gusa igice cy'imyaka (ntitukoresha itariki y'ukuri y'umunsi w'ukubyara). Iki ni ukugira ngo dukomeze Random Chat pairings mu buryo bwa kiboneza.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Koresha age-based matching mu Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Igihe cy'iku, dushaka guhuza na bantu mu gice cy'imyaka gihuje.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ab'umwaka wa 13-17 bahuza gusa n'abandi b'umwaka wa 13-17. Abakuru ntibahuje n'ab'umwaka wa 13-17.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Kugira umutekano, konti z'umwaka wa 13–17 zihuza gusa n'izindi konti z'umwaka wa 13–17 mu Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Igihe cy'iku, Foria ishobora gukoresha ibiganiro byawe bya kera bya Random Chat (gusa nawe) kugira ngo ikomeze ikiganiro. Ushobora guhagarika igihe icyo ari cyo.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Siga ubusa kugira ngo ubike kugeza iteka
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Email yo kohereza ibimenyetso bya voicemail
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Gukoreshwa igihe greeting ya audio itariho.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemail ziva ku nomero za Chatforia zawe zibikwa mu inbox ya Voicemail yawe. Ushobora koresha transcription n'ikohereza mu gahunda zishyigikwa.
profile.portHint: Ushaka kugumana nomero yawe y'ubu? Ushobora kuyikora muri Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Gira data ya mobile ya Chatforia igihe uri kure ya Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Kugenzura gahunda ya mobile ya Chatforia, nomero, ikohereza, n'ikohereza nomero.

options.heading: Hitamo uko ushaka gukoresha Chatforia
options.subheading: Ushobora kugira nomero nshya ya Chatforia, cyangwa kwinjiza nomero yawe y'ubu iva ku wundi mukoresha.
options.portNumber: Kwinjiza nomero yawe y'ubu muri Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Kwinjiza nomero yawe y'ubu
port.subheading: Hindura nomero yawe y'ubu iva ku mukoresha wawe w'ubu muri Chatforia. Reba ko ibisobanuro bihuje n'akonti yawe y'umukoresha kugira ngo udufite ikibazo.
port.success: Icyifuzo cyo kwinjiza cyoherejwe! Tuzakomeza kukumenyesha.

status.heading: Status y'ikohereza
status.subheading: Kurikirana status y'icyifuzo cyo kwinjiza nomero yawe.

wireless.exhausted: Data yawe yarangiye. Gura pack nshya kugira ngo ukomeze gukoresha data ya mobile.

error.invite: Ntiwashoboye kurema icyifuzo. Reba ko uri umuyobozi w'umuryango kandi gerageza nanone.
error.checkout: Ntiwashoboye gutangira checkout ku gahunda y'Umuryango. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.

billing.freePlanCopy: Uri ku gahunda y'ubusa. Upgrade kugira ngo ubone ibikoresho byinshi.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Ushobora kugenzura cyangwa guhagarika subscription muri billing portal, cyangwa guhagarika ako kanya hejuru.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Wizeye ko ushaka guhagarika gahunda yawe ako kanya? Ibi ntibishobora guhindurwa.
billing.cancelNowError: Ntiwashoboye guhagarika gahunda yawe ubu. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone cyangwa koresha Manage billing.

none.title: Nta muryango w'ubu
none.body: Kugira ngo ureme Chatforia Family n'ikigega cy'ibanze cyagabanijwe, tangira gahunda y'Umuryango.

data.heading: Ikigega cy'ibanze cyagabanijwe
data.caption: Abanyamuryango bose bagabana iki kigega. Tuzakumenyesha igihe uri kwegera igice.

invite.title: Tuma umunyamuryango mushya
invite.body: Kohereza email cyangwa link kugira ngo utume umuntu mu kigega cy'ibanze cy'umuryango wawe.
invite.expiryHint: Iyi link igishura nyuma y'iminsi mike. Ushobora buri gihe kurema iya nshya.

join.title: Injira mu muryango
join.body: Watumwe kugira ngo winjire mu muryango wa Chatforia kandi mugabane ikigega cy'ibanze cyabo.
join.success: Winjiye mu muryango uyu. Ubu uragabana ikigega cy'ibanze cyabo.
join.error: Ntiwashoboye kongeramo umuryango uyu. Icyifuzo gishobora kuba cy'ibanze cyangwa cyashize.

premium.heading: Kujya Premium
premium.description: Fungura ibikoresho bya power & kura ads.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tangira na gahunda y'ubusa ifite ads. Kujya ad-free na Plus, cyangwa fungura ibikoresho byose na Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Hitamo gahunda y'app, ongerekamo data packs kuri wowe, cyangwa ugabane data na umuryango wawe — bose ku kintu kimwe.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tangira na gahunda y'ubusa ifite ads. Kujya ad-free na Plus, cyangwa fungura ibikoresho byose na Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Ongerekamo data ya global eSIM kugira ngo Chatforia ikomeze gukora igihe uri kure ya Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Kurema ikigega cy'ibanze cyagabanijwe ku muryango wawe kandi ugenzure ukoresha buri wese ku kintu kimwe.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Fungura ibikoresho bya power & kura ads.

free.title: Ubusa
free.desc: Tangira ubutumwa mu busa. Gishobora kuba igihe uri kugerageza Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 n'ikiganiro cy'itsinda, hamwe n'amajwi n'itangira ry'ivideyo
features.media: Sangiza ifoto, ubutumwa bw'amajwi, n'ibice bya videyo
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies n'ihindura ry'ibanze (fair use)
features.ads: Ubusa kugeza iteka hamwe n'ads mu app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Iby'ibanze byose, nta ads. Gishobora kuba buri munsi ubutumwa n'itangira.

features.forwarding: Kohereza hamagara n'ubutumwa ku nomero ya telephone yawe y'ukuri
features.history: Ubutumwa bwa kera bwa kera (kugeza ku mezi 6)
features.support: Ubufasha bwihuse igihe ikintu cy'ikibazo cyabaye

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Buri kwezi)
premiumMonthly.desc: Iby'umwanya bya Chatforia: ibikoresho bya AI, guhindura, n'ubufasha bwa priority.

features.themes: Fungura themes zose za premium color n'ibindi bya app
features.ai: Ibikoresho bya AI bya Premium gusa ku rewrites, smart replies, n'ibisobanuro
features.support: Ubufasha bwa priority igihe ukeneye ubufasha cyane

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Buri mwaka)
premiumAnnual.desc: Zigama byinshi igihe ushyira buri mwaka — harimo themes z'inyongera za color, ibikoresho bya AI, n'ubufasha bwa priority.

features.allPremium: Ibyose muri Premium Buri kwezi — harimo themes z'inyongera za color
features.save25: Zigama hafi 30% ugereranyije na buri kwezi
features.bestFor: Gishobora kuba ku bantu bakoresha cyane, abakora kure, n'abagenda cyane

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Bishyirwa imbere. Hagarika igihe icyo ari cyo. Nta fees zihishe.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Ibikoresho byose, ringtones, n'ibikoresho bya AI power.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Zigama byinshi igihe ushyira buri mwaka.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Bishyirwa imbere. Hagarika igihe icyo ari cyo. Nta fees zihishe.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Ongerekamo data ya global kugira ngo Chatforia ikomeze gukora n'igihe uri kure ya Wi-Fi. Igiciro kigira icyo gihindura ku gihugu cyawe n'igiciro.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Hitamo pack y'ibanze ya global data kugira ngo Chatforia ikomeze gukora igihe uri ku rugendo cyangwa uri kure ya Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Ntitugurisha data packs munsi ya 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi ku gukoresha cyane
features.throttle: Umuvuduko ushobora kugabanuka nyuma y'igikoresho cyinshi

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs isaba igikoresho cy'ibanze cy'eSIM kandi cy'ibanze. Iby'ubushobozi bihuje n'ubwoko bw'iphone, umukoresha, n'igihugu. Coverage n'umuvuduko bihuje n'igice.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Harimo 3 GB ya data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi — gishobora kuba ku butumwa bwa kinyamabanga n'itangira ry'ibanze.
small.bestFor: Ingendo z'igikurikira, ubutumwa bwa kinyamabanga, n'itangira ry'ibanze

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Harimo 5 GB ya data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi ku ngendo, commuting, n'itangira ry'ibanze ry'VoIP.
medium.bestFor: Ingendo z'umunsi w'ikiruhuko, itangira ry'ibanze ry'VoIP, n'maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Harimo 10 GB ya data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi ku chat y'ingenzi, hamagara, n'ivideyo ku ntora ya Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Chat y'ingenzi, hamagara, videyo, n'ikoresho ry'ibanze
large.aria: Gura Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Gereranya eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Uko data ikoreshwa igira icyo gihuye n'uko ukoresha Chatforia (amajwi, videyo, media, n'ibindi bya telephone yawe).

family.title: Chatforia Family (data yagabanijwe)
family.subtitle: Gabana ikigega cy'ibanze kimwe ku muryango wawe. Igiciro kimwe, konti nyinshi za Chatforia, coverage ya global.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Harimo 20 GB ya data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi yagabanijwe — gishobora kuba ku bakoresha 2–3 b'ibanze.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Harimo 40 GB ya data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi yagabanijwe — gishobora kuba ku banyamuryango 3–5 bakoresha cyane.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Harimo 80 GB ya data y'umuvuduko w'ingenzi yagabanijwe — ku miryango y'ingenzi itari ku kintu.

feature.shared: Ikigega cy'ibanze cyagabanijwe ku muryango wawe
feature.membersMore: Gishobora kuba ku banyamuryango 3–5 bakoresha cyane
feature.topUp: Ongerekamo packs byinshi igihe icyo ari cyo
feature.fairUse: Igira icyo gihuje n'politiki y'ibanze n'ibice by'aho

family.disclaimer: Family packs kurema cyangwa top up ikigega cy'ibanze cyagabanijwe. Ushobora gutuma kandi gukura abanyamuryango igihe icyo ari cyo.
family.footnote: Family packs gabana ikigega cy'ibanze kimwe ku konti za Chatforia z'umubano. Iby'ubushobozi n'ibice bihuje n'igihugu cyawe n'amategeko y'aho.

why.title: Kuki abantu bahindura ku Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia iguha nomero y'ukuri ya telephone, guhindura mu buryo bwa smart, n'inzira y'ibanze yo kujya ad-free igihe uri yiteguye.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads yoroshye kuri Free, upgrade y'ibanze ya Plus igihe uri yiteguye, n'ibikoresho bya Premium TextNow itagira.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App ya modern, igishushanyo cy'ibanze cy'isi, n'ihindura ry'ibanze ry'ibanze aho kuba call forwarding ya kera.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Andika nomero z'ukuri za telephone — ntibari gusa ku bandi mukoresha b'app — hamwe na AI n'status y'ibanze. Gishobora kuba igihe uri kuva ku apps nka TextFree cyangwa TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Guhuza bihuje n'ibisobanuro by'ibanze by'ibanze kandi bishobora guhindura mu gihe. Ibindi apps by'ubusa byo gutandika nka TextFree cyangwa TextMe bihuje na TextNow.

free.a: Yego. Gahunda y'ubusa irimo nomero ya Chatforia, itangira, n'ubutumwa hamwe n'ads. Ushobora kuguma kuri Free igihe icyo ari cyo, cyangwa upgrade kugira ngo ukure ads kandi ufungure ibikoresho byinshi.

plusPremium.q: Iki gihuye na Plus na Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus ikura ads kandi igira ubutumwa bwa kera bwa kera — gishobora kuba ku gukoresha buri munsi. Premium ongerekamo ibindi by'ibanze, ibikoresho bya AI ku rewrites n'replies, n'ubufasha bwa priority ku bakoresha cyane.

esim.q: Aho eSIM data packs ikora he?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile ikoresha coverage ya global eSIM. Iby'ubushobozi bihuje n'igihugu cyawe n'igikoresho. Uzabona iby'ubushobozi igihe cyo gukora activation mu app.

cancel.q: Nshobora guhagarika cyangwa guhindura gahunda igihe icyo ari cyo?
cancel.a: Yego. Ushobora kugenzura cyangwa guhagarika subscription iva ku ipaji y'billing mu app. Ibihinduka bigira icyo bigira ku mpera y'igihe cy'ibanze cy'ubwishyinguro.

family.a: Family packs kurema ikigega cy'ibanze cyagabanijwe ku konti nyinshi za Chatforia. Umuntu umwe ashyira igiciro, kandi ushobora gutuma cyangwa gukura abanyamuryango kandi ushyire igice ku muntu wese.

gettingStarted.title: Gutangira
gettingStarted.subtitle: Ushya muri Chatforia? Iyi guide y'ibanze yerekana iby'ingenzi kugira ngo ubone iby'ingenzi mu kanya.

alert.text: Iyi guide izakura igihe tuzashyira ibikoresho bishya. Niba ikintu kibuze, tumenyeshe binyuze muri

section2.title: 2) Tangira ubutumwa
section2.item1: Kurema DM cyangwa Group kandi kohereza ubutumwa bwawe bwa mbere.
section2.item2: Koresha ihindura ry'ibanze kugira ngo uganire mu ndimi 100+.
section2.item3: Gerageza ubutumwa bw'igikurikira n'ibimenyetso byo gusoma muri Profil → Ibanga.

section3.title: 3) Komeza
section3.item1: Ushobora upgrade ku gahunda y'ishyura igihe icyo ari cyo mu app.
section3.item2: Igihe winjiye, ushobora guhuza ibikoresho by'inyongera kandi ushyiremu backups y'ibanga iva mu Settings mu app.

account.q: Uko nshobora kurema cyangwa kugarura konti yanjye?
account.a: Kurikira app cyangwa koresha web, kanda “Kurema konti”, reba email/telephone yawe. Kugira ngo ubugarure, koresha “Wibagirwa ijambo ry'ibanga”.

privacy.a: Yego. Ubutumwa n'itangira ry'amajwi n'ivideyo ni end-to-end encrypted by'ibanze. Gusa wowe n'uwandikiye ushobora kubisoma.

translate.a: Koresha “Auto-hindura” muri Settings → Kuboneka & Ururimi. Dushindura ku kintu cy'ibanze aho bishyigikwa, cyangwa binyuze mu APIs z'umutekano hamwe n'ibisobanuro by'ibanze.

contact.a: Twandikire muri support@chatforia.com. Ongeramo screenshots n'ubwoko bw'app yawe.

intro.body: Iyi Politiki y'ibanga isobanura uko Chatforia (“twe”, “twe”) ikusanya, ikoresha, kandi igabana amakuru igihe ukoresha apps n'ibikoresho byacu. Twashushanyije Chatforia kugira ngo igabanye ibyo dushobora kugera.

infoWeCollect.title: Amakuru dukura
infoWeCollect.account: Amakuru y'akonti (e.g., email/telephone) kugira ngo kurema kandi ukomeze konti yawe.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Iby'ibanga by'umwambaro (ubutumwa/itangira) ni end-to-end encrypted; ntitushobora kubisoma.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/igikoresho nka crash logs, ubwoko bw'igikoresho, cyangwa analytics y'ibanze kugira ngo dushyire iby'ingenzi.

sms.title: Nomero za telephone za mobile n'SMS
sms.body: Niba uhitamo gutanga nomero ya telephone ya mobile, twakoresha kugira ngo twemeze ibikoresho nka verification y'akonti, ibimenyetso byo kwinjira, n'ubutumwa bwa user-to-user binyuze mu SMS aho bishyigikwa. Tushobora kohereza ubutumwa bwa transactional SMS bifitanye isano n'akonti yawe n'ibikorwa kuri Chatforia. Ushobora gukora opt out ku kubona ubutumwa bwa SMS igihe icyo ari cyo binyuze mu gusubiza na keyword y'opt-out y'ishyigikwa (nk'“STOP”) cyangwa guhindura ibimenyetso bya notification muri app. Ntiturangisha nomero yawe ya telephone cyangwa tukayikoresha ku marketing itari isano.
sms.addRecipient: Ongera uwandikiye hejuru kugira ngo utangire…

howWeUse.title: Uko dukoresha amakuru
howWeUse.provide: Gutanga kandi gukomeza ikikoresho (auth, gukora spam/abuse).

sharing.title: Gugabana
sharing.body: Ntiturangisha amakuru y'ibanze. Tushobora kugabana amakuru y'ibanze hamwe n'abakoresha (e.g., ibimenyetso byo kugera, analytics) binyuze mu amasezerano y'umutekano.

rights.title: Uburenganzira bwawe
rights.body: Bihuje n'igice cyawe (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ushobora gusaba kugera, guhindura, gukura, cyangwa opt-out ku gukora bimwe. Twandikire: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Kubika amakuru & umutekano
retention.body: Dukoresha gusa iby'ingenzi kugira ngo dukoreshe ikikoresho kandi dukoreshe umutekano w'ingenzi. Iby'ibanga bya E2E ntibishobora gukoreshwa na twe.

children.title: Abana
children.body: Chatforia ntigerekewe ku bana munsi ya 13 (cyangwa nk'uko amategeko y'aho asaba).

changes.title: Ibihinduka
changes.body: Tuzashyira ibihinduka hano kandi tuhindure itariki y'“Yahinduwe nyuma”.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ukoresha Chatforia wemera aya masezerano. Niba utemera, ntukoreshe ikikoresho.

accounts.title: Konti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Tanga amakuru y'ukuri kandi ukomeze credentials mu mutekano.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Uri inshingano y'ibikorwa ku konti yawe.

acceptableUse.title: Uko ukoresha by'ibanze
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Nta iby'ibanze, iby'ibanga, cyangwa iby'ibanze; nta spam cyangwa gukoresha automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: Niba utanga nomero ya telephone ya mobile, wemera ko Chatforia ishobora kohereza ubutumwa bwa SMS bifitanye isano n'akonti yawe n'ikoresho ry'ikikoresho, nk'ibimenyetso byo kwinjira, ibimenyetso by'umutekano, n'ubutumwa bifitanye isano n'ibiganiro wahinduye cyangwa wakoresheje. Ntiturakoresha SMS ku butumwa bwa promotional cyangwa marketing nta n'ubwo wemeye. Igiciro cy'ubutumwa n'data gishobora kugira icyo gishyura. Ushobora gukora opt out ku ubutumwa bwa SMS igihe icyo ari cyo binyuze mu gusubiza na keyword y'opt-out y'ishyigikwa (nk'“STOP”) cyangwa guhindura settings ya notification muri app.

yourContent.title: Ibyawe
yourContent.body: Uragumana uburenganzira ku byawe. Utanga twe uburenganzira bwa ngombwa kugira ngo dukoreshe ikikoresho (e.g., routing, kubika, guhindura).

disclaimer.title: Ibihishe & inshingano
disclaimer.body: Ikikoresho cyatanzwe “nk'uko kiri” nta warranties. Ku gice cyose cyemewe n'amategeko, Chatforia ntishobora kuba inshingano ku iby'ibanze cyangwa iby'ibanze.

changes.title: Ibihinduka
changes.body: Tushobora guhindura aya masezerano; gukomeza gukoresha nyuma y'ibihinduka bisobanura kwemera.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ntiugurisha cyangwa ugabana Amakuru yanjye y'ibanze
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ntigurisha amakuru y'ibanze. Abaturage ba California bashobora kohereza icyifuzo binyuze mu butumwa bwa CPRA ukoresheje buto hejuru.

cookies.title: Settings ya Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia ikoresha cookies y'ibanze (e.g., session, umutekano). Ntiturakoresha cookies y'ads y'umwanya wa gatatu. Genza cookies binyuze muri settings ya browser yawe.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Ntiwashoboye gukura status ya nomero ya telephone.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Nta nomero yashyizwe. Hitamo imwe ku code y'igice kugira ngo utangire gutandika.

startChatModal.title: Tangira chat
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Andika izina, izina ry'umukoresha, nomero ya telephone, cyangwa email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Shakisha ku izina ry'umukoresha cyangwa nomero ya telephone
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Andika izina ry'umukoresha cyangwa nomero ya telephone kandi ukande Shakisha.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Nomero/email z'ibanze zizaboneka nyuma yo kubika nk'abakoresha.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Guhindura chat na abo wahitamo byanze.

sounds.freeNotice: Uri ku Free — premium tones zerekana ariko zifunze. Upgrade kugira ngo ufungure zose.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Iki gikoresho gisaba gahunda ya Premium.

aiSettings.title: Settings ya AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Genzura guhindura, smart replies, n'ibisubizo bya ForiaBot.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Kohereza ubutumwa bwa kera bwa kera (sanitized) ku AI kugira ngo ushintse replies z'ibanze.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Mask profanity mu bisubizo bya AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Igihe cy'iku, ibisubizo bya AI bizagira amagambo y'ibanze yahishe

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Ibimenyetso
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Ibikoresho kugira ngo Chatforia ibe yoroshye gukoresha nta gukoresha amajwi.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Itangirira ku ubwoko bw'ibanze. Ongera niba ukunda inyuguti nini muri accessibility settings.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Ibimenyetso by'ibanze ku butumwa & hamagara
Erekana banners n'ibimenyetso by'izina kugira ngo udafite ikintu.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate ku butumwa bushya (igihe bishyigikwa)
Koresha vibration y'igikoresho hamwe n'ibimenyetso.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen ku hamagara ryinjiye
Flash y'ibanze y'umucyo igihe hamagara rirangira.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Ongera transcript ku butumwa bw'amajwi wakiriye.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Erekana banners n'ibimenyetso by'izina kugira ngo udafite ikintu.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Flash y'ibanze y'umucyo igihe hamagara rirangira.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Bika gusa ciphertext ku server. Ihagarika AI/Hindura n'ibisobanuro by'ibanze bya moderation.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Shakisha ku alias, izina, izina ry'umukoresha, cyangwa nomero ya telephone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Ibintu bike by'ihuse kugira ngo utangire.
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Shakisha ku nomero ya telephone / izina ry'umukoresha
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Sangiza link y'icyifuzo cyawe kugira ngo utangire kuganira mu kanya.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Komeza kuba ufite umubano ku rugendo hamwe na Chatforia ku iOS na Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Ubutumwa bwawe burakomeza kuba synced ku web na mobile.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Huza umuntu mushya mu kanya. Tuzahuza kandi tufungure icyumba cy'ikiganiro cy'igikurikira. Chat mu buryo bwa kibanga mbere. Ongera Inshuti nyuma niba ubona neza.
randomChat.saveGuard: Gusa ibiganiro by'umuntu ku muntu gishobora kubikwa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Dukoresha gusa igice cy'imyaka (ntitukoresha itariki y'ukuri y'umunsi w'ukubyara). Iki ni ukugira ngo dukomeze Random Chat pairings mu buryo bwa kiboneza. Kugira ngo huza na bantu (ntibari gusa RiaBot), shyira igice cy'imyaka yawe muri Settings → Igice cy'imyaka & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Shyira igice cy'imyaka yawe muri Profil → Igice cy'imyaka & Random Chat kugira ngo huza na bantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Kugira ngo huza na bantu (ntibari gusa RiaBot), shyira igice cy'imyaka yawe muri Settings → Igice cy'imyaka & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Huza umuntu mushya mu kanya, cyangwa hitamo ganira na Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Shyira igice cy'imyaka yawe muri Profil → Igice cy'imyaka & Random Chat kugira ngo huza na bantu.

ria.intro: Hey aho 👋 Ndi Ria. Iki kiri mu mutwe wawe?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 Ndi hano. Iki kiri mu mutwe wawe?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Iki ushaka kuganira uyu munsi?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}!! Ndi amatwi yose — iki kiri hejuru?
greetings.long4: Nice kubona wowe, {{name}} 👋 Iki kiri mu mutwe wawe uyu munsi?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 Ushaka kuganira, gusaba, cyangwa gusa kuganira?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Ndi n'igihe — iki ushaka kuganira?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, ndi hano. Iki kiri hejuru?
greetings.short2: Murakaza neza nanone {{name}} 👋 Hari ikindi ushaka kongeramo?
greetings.short3: Nanone, {{name}}? 😊 Vuga iki kiri mu mutwe wawe.
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! Ufite ikintu gishya mu mutwe wawe?

login.title: Komeza ku Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Injira ku konti ya Chatforia yawe
login.subtitle: Injira ku konti ya Chatforia yawe

forgot.title: Wibagirwa Ijambo ry'ibanga
forgot.helper: Injiza email wakoresheje kugira ngo ukure konti ya Chatforia kandi tuzakohereza link y'umutekano kugira ngo uhindure ijambo ry'ibanga.
forgot.genericError: Ntiwashoboye gukora icyifuzo. Nyamuneka gerageza mu kanya.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on ntibishoboye ubu. Koresha izina ry'umukoresha & ijambo ry'ibanga.

error.invalid: Izina ry'umukoresha cyangwa ijambo ry'ibanga ntiry'ukuri
error.unprocessable: Icyifuzo ntiry'ukuri. Reba izina ry'umukoresha/email n'ijambo ry'ibanga.
error.deviceLimit: Igice cy'igikoresho cyageze ku gahunda y'ubusa. Sohoka ku kintu cy'ibanze cy'indi cyangwa upgrade ku Premium kugira ngo uhuze ibikoresho byinshi.
error.premiumRequired: Iki gikorwa gisaba gahunda ya Premium.

dialer.title: Hamagara
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & recents. (Niba udakoresha PSTN, tangira hamagara iva ku ikiganiro cy'ibanze.)

video.title: Videyo
video.roomsDesc: Videyo y'abantu benshi ukoresheje izina ry'icyumba cyagabanijwe.
video.roomsIntro: Injira cyangwa kurema icyumba cy'abantu benshi.
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: ushobora deep link directly ku /video?room=room-name.

direct.title: Direct Videyo
direct.subtitle: Tangira itangira ry'ivideyo 1:1 ukoresheje nomero ya telephone cyangwa izina ry'umukoresha wa Chatforia.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Paste nomero kandi hamagara nta kubika umukoresha. Tuzatuma abakoresha b'inyuma na link.

search.placeholder: Shakisha ku izina cyangwa izina ry'umukoresha
search.aria: Shakisha ku izina cyangwa izina ry'umukoresha

rooms.title: Ibyumba
rooms.subtitle: Kurema icyumba cyangwa injira mu kiriho ukandika izina ry'umwanya.
rooms.desc: Videyo y'abantu benshi ukoresheje izina ry'icyumba cyagabanijwe.
rooms.tip: Tip: sangiza iyi izina na bandi, cyangwa deep link ku /video?room=room-name.

directVideo.findUserPh: Shakisha ku izina cyangwa izina ry'umukoresha

phoneWarning.title: Nomero yawe igishura vuba
phoneWarning.body: Nomero yawe {{number}} izasohoka ku {{date}} keretse igarurwa.

support.heading: Uko dushobora kugufasha?
support.contactIntro: Tuzakohereza email y'igisubizo. Ongeramo ibisobanuro kugira ngo udufashe kugarura ikibazo.

account.q: Uko nshobora kurema cyangwa kugarura konti yanjye?
account.a: Kurikira app cyangwa koresha web, kanda “Kurema konti”, reba email/telephone yawe. Kugira ngo ubugarure, koresha “Wibagirwa ijambo ry'ibanga”.

privacy.a: Yego. Ubutumwa n'itangira ry'amajwi n'ivideyo ni end-to-end encrypted by'ibanze. Gusa wowe n'uwandikiye ushobora kubisoma.

translate.a: Koresha “Auto-hindura” muri Settings → Kuboneka & Ururimi. Dushindura ku kintu cy'ibanze aho bishyigikwa, cyangwa binyuze mu APIs z'umutekano hamwe n'ibisobanuro by'ibanze.

contact.a: Twandikire muri support@chatforia.com. Ongeramo screenshots n'ubwoko bw'app yawe.

encryptionRecovery.title: Kugenzura Iby'ibanga
encryptionRecovery.description: Kubika, kugarura, fungura, cyangwa kugarura ubufunguzo bwawe bw'ibanga.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Iyi browser ntishobora ubu guhindura ubutumwa bwawe bw'ibanga. Garura, fungura, cyangwa kugarura ubufunguzo kugira ngo ukomeze.

unlockPasscode.label: Fungura passcode (kintu cy'ibanze cy'ubu)
unlockPasscode.description: Gukoreshwa kugira ngo guhindura ibifunguzo byawe ku kintu cy'ibanze mbere yo gukora export

backupPassword.label: Ijambo ry'ibanga ry'ubufunguzo bwo kubika
backupPassword.description: Gukoreshwa kugira ngo gukoresha encrypt dosiye y'ubufunguzo bwo kubika

restoreBackupPassword.label: Ijambo ry'ibanga ry'ubufunguzo bwo kubika
restoreBackupPassword.description: Ijambo ry'ibanga wakoresheje igihe ukora backup y'ubufunguzo bwawe ku iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Passcode nshya y'ibanze
newLocalPasscode.description: Komeza ibifunguzo ku kintu cy'ibanze kuri iyi browser

resetLocalPasscode.label: Passcode nshya y'ibanze
resetLocalPasscode.description: Isabwa mbere yo kugarura kugira ngo ubufunguzo bushya bukomeze ku kintu cy'ibanze

messages.backupCreated: Ubufunguzo bwo kubika bwaremwe kandi bwakurikiranywe.
messages.keyRestored: Ubufunguzo bwaragaruwe iva ku backup y'akonti.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Kugarura ubufunguzo ntikwuzuye cyangwa ntikw'ukuri ku konti iyi
errors.noBackup: Nta bufunguzo bwo kubika bw'ibanga buriho ku konti iyi
errors.missingPublicKey: Ubufunguzo bwo kubika burimo ubufunguzo bwa public
errors.noServerPublicKey: Iyi konti ntishyigikira ubu ubufunguzo bwa public bwa server
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Ubufunguzo bwo kubika bwa server ntibuhuje n'ubufunguzo bw'ibanga bw'akonti y'ubu

confirm.reset:
Kugarura iby'ibanga ku konti iyi?

Ubutumwa bwa kera bw'ibanga bishobora kuba ntibishobora gusomwa keretse ubugarura ubufunguzo bw'umwimerere nyuma.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Iki kirema ubufunguzo bushya bw'ibanga ku konti yawe. Ubutumwa bwa kera bw'ibanga bishobora kuba ntibishobora gusomwa keretse ubugarura ubufunguzo bw'umwimerere nyuma.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ni app y'ubutumwa y'ibanga ry'ibanze ituma ibiganiro by'ururimi rwa cross-language biboneka. Ubutumwa ni end-to-end encrypted by'ibanze, kandi ihindura ry'ibanze rishyigikira indimi 100+ mu kanya. Abakoresha bashobora koresha ubutumwa bw'igikurikira, kugumana ibimenyetso byo gusoma optional, n'sync ku ibikoresho. Bihari ku iOS, Android, na web.
press.scanTip: Ku desktop? Scan na telephone yawe kugira ngo ubone app.

careers.title: Ibikorwa
careers.intro: Turi ikipe y'ibanze y'ibanze yubaka Chatforia — umutumwa w'ibanze, w'isi yose utangira ku web, iOS, n'Android. Niba ukunda ibanga, iby'ibanga, n'ibikorwa by'umukoresha by'ibanze, twishimye kumva ibyawe.
careers.openRoles: Ibikorwa by'ibanze by'ibanze: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Uko ukoresha: Koresha buto hejuru kugira ngo wandike resume yawe n'ibindi.
careers.whyBullets:
• Fasha kubaka urufatiro rw'umutumwa w'isi nshya.
• Kohereza ibihinduka bikoreshwa ku web, iOS, n'Android.
• Kora directly na founder ku gishushanyo n'icyerekezo cy'ibikoresho.
• Kugira ibice by'ingenzi by'ikintu: ubutumwa, amajwi, videyo, iby'ibanga, telecom, AI.
• Injira mu ntangiriro — mbere y'uko abakoresha bagabanuka.

about.title: Ibyerekeye Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ni umutumwa w'umutekano, w'ururimi rw'ibanze hamwe n'iby'ibanga bya end-to-end, ihindura ry'ibanze, n'itangira ry'amajwi/n'ivideyo. Mission yacu ni y'ibanze: gufasha abantu guhuza—mu mutekano, mu ibanga, kandi mu ndimi.

values.control: Ubuyobozi: Ubutumwa bw'igikurikira & ibimenyetso byo gusoma ni optional.
values.privacy_aria: Ibanga ry'ibanze: Iby'ibanga bya E2E by'ibanze.
values.control_aria: Ubuyobozi: Ubutumwa bw'igikurikira n'ibimenyetso byo gusoma ni optional.

about.howDescription: Ubutumwa ni encrypted ku kintu cyawe mbere y'uko buvamo. Ihindura, backups, n'sync y'ibikoresho ni igishushanyo kugira ngo igabanye ibyo servers zacu zishobora kubona.

advertise.title: Advertise na Chatforia
advertise.description: Huza abakoresha b'ubutumwa bafite umubano hamwe n'ibishushanyo by'ibanze, by'umutekano. Dutanga banner inventory mu bice by'ibanze bya visibility, sponsorships, n'ibikorwa by'ibanze. Abakoresha ba premium ntibabona ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Dutanga inventory na Google AdSense. Ushobora kugera Chatforia na publisher ID {{pubId}}, cyangwa koresha form hejuru ku direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Dutanga inventory imwe na Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships bihari—koresha form hejuru.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Turimo guhita inventory yacu y'ads. Tumenyeshe iby'icyifuzo cyawe kandi tuzaguha iby'ibanze by'ibanze.

why.highSession: Igihe cy'ibanze cy'ibanze n'igihe cy'ibanze mu UI y'ikiganiro
why.deals: Direct deals cyangwa programmatic binyuze mu AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Murakoze! Icyifuzo cyawe kiri ku nzira. Tuzakurikirana vuba.
form.mailtoInfo: Gufungura email client yawe kugira ngo kohereze icyifuzo…
